entry.title: New: RES25-114 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $1,685 TO THE CITY FROM HARVARD UNIVERSITY FOR A MEMBER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN RESOURCES TO PARTICIPATE IN THE HARVARD KENNEDY SCHOOL'S INAUGURAL STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT CAREER EXPO AND FORUM PROGRAM IN CAMBRIDGE, MASSACHUSETTS FROM APRIL 17-18, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
